---
agent: agent
---
Use the instructions in [unitTest.instructions.md](../instructions/unitTest.instructions.md) to guide your implementation. Execute the created or updated test file to ensure all tests pass successfully or iterate until they do.

If there already exists a test file ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.spec.ts in the same directory as the source file ${fileBasename}, assume that the source file ${fileBasename} has been modified. Update the existing test file ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.spec.ts to reflect the changes made in ${fileBasename}. If there are no changes or all relevant test cases are already covered it is also an option to leave the test file unchanged.

If there is no existing test file ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.spec.ts in the same directory as the source file ${fileBasename}, create a test file ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.spec.ts for the source file ${fileBasename}. The test file should be placed in the same directory as the source file.
